name: @agent-api/sdk
description: Production JavaScript SDK for the Managed Agent API

scripts.prepack: npm run sync-version && npm run build
scripts.test: npm run sync-version && npm run build && node --test test/index.test.mjs test/local-function-integration.test.mjs test/local-runtime.test.mjs
scripts.test:integration: npm run sync-version && npm run build && node --test test/integration.test.mjs
scripts.test:integration:local-functions: npm run sync-version && npm run build && node --test test/local-function-integration.test.mjs
